name: Almond Meringue Torte
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together dry ingredients.
2. Cut butter into the dry ingredients.
3. Stir in the egg yolk.
4. Pat the mixture into a buttered 8-inch square pan.
5. Bake at 350°F for 15 minutes.
6. While the cake bakes, beat the egg whites until stiff.
7. Beat in confectioner's sugar and ground almonds.
8. When the cake is set and light golden brown, remove from the oven.
9. Spread with jam.
10. Return to the oven and bake at 450°F for 5-10 minutes.
